violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Observed wedges, curly fries stored on floor in walk in freezer.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. Observed food items in storage containers, green beans with lid on can without date marking.
Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --An approved sanitizer was not used in spray bottle. Disinfectant used to clean table. Needs to be followed by sanitizer.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. To go cups, lids trays were observed to be stored on floor in kitchen area and storage room.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. Hamburger patties not date marked in refrigerator.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Observed freezer lid was made of insulation board. Needs to be smooth,cleanable.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Togo containers stored on the floor.
